final_prompt.prompt:
Create a panoramic illustration of the Tang Dynasty 长安 city Lantern Festival at night.

Style/medium: must be 工笔重彩长卷 (meticulous brushwork, heavy color, handscroll format)
Composition: needs a sweeping panoramic view of the entire cityscape — exact framing and perspective flow is yours
Subject: must include thousands of lanterns (万盏花灯) illuminating the night sky
Scene/backdrop: must include Tang Dynasty 长安 cityscape at night during the Lantern Festival
Lighting/mood: needs a festive night atmosphere with countless lanterns as light sources — exact glow distribution is yours
Color palette: needs a traditional Chinese painting color direction with rich mineral pigments — exact pigment choices are yours
Materials/textures: needs a silk handscroll surface treatment — exact paper/silk texture is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must preserve Tang Dynasty 长安 geographic and architectural authenticity
Avoid:
